summary: Night-Based Booking Logic (Booking.com style) - All features VERIFIED. API returns blockedNights array with logic='night-based' in meta. Check-out days are NOT blocked, enabling back-to-back bookings. Calendar correctly disables only blocked nights. Price calculation is nights-based.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: getBlockedNights() correctly excludes check_out date - returns check_in to check_out-1
API returns 'logic: night-based' in meta for frontend to identify booking model
hasBlockedNightInRange() in booking-date-picker.jsx correctly validates range
Calendar isDateDisabled() checks blockedNightsSet for night-based blocking
Price breakdown correctly shows 'nights' calculation (check_out - check_in)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Night-based booking logic fully verified. Key concept: getBlockedNights() returns dates from check_in to check_out-1 (exclusive end). Example: booking April 1-5 blocks nights 1,2,3,4 but NOT 5. Night 5 can be new check_in for back-to-back booking.

api_returns_blocked_nights_array.evidence: API returns blockedNights array (not blockedDates) with 24 items

checkout_day_not_in_blocked_nights.evidence: April 5 NOT in blockedNights - available for new check-in

back_to_back_booking_april_5_7.evidence: API returns available=true, conflicts=[], requestedNights=2 for April 5-7

nights_within_booking_blocked.evidence: April 1-4 are in blockedNights (nights of April 1-5 booking)

calendar_disables_blocked_nights.evidence: UI shows April 1-4, 15-16, 20-24 as disabled; April 5, 17, 25 are available

price_calculation_nights_based.evidence: Price breakdown shows 'Rental cost (2 nights)' for April 5-7 booking

no_unavailable_dates_warning.evidence: No 'X dates unavailable' warning in UI - calendar just disables blocked nights

ui_test_results.april_1_4_disabled: PASS - All nights within booking are blocked
ui_test_results.april_5_available: PASS - Checkout day clickable for new check-in

console_output_highlights: PASS: Price breakdown shows '2 nights' - night-based calculation working
